blended.narrative: Lakeridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
